title: Skoplje '63
writer: Jovan Boskovski, Stevan Bulajic, Ratko Djurovic
plot: "Skoplje '63" is a 1964 Yugoslavian documentary film directed by Veljko Bulajic about the 1963 Skopje earthquake (Skoplje, per film title, is the Serbo-Croatian spelling of Skopje). The filming started three days after the earthqu...
